comment: Property dossier tools — MPP-gated on deployed property-service. mpp: true uses mppx client (402 → Stripe SPT or Tempo).

tools.name: property_seller_disclosure
tools.description: Retrieve the long-form seller property disclosure narrative for 1842 Hawthorne Ridge Rd (structure, systems, environmental, insurance claims, easements). Use during diligence or negotiation.

tools.name: property_hoa_packet
tools.description: Retrieve HOA dues, special assessments, STR rules, ARB design guidelines, resale certificate fees, and enforcement summary for Hawthorne Ridge Owners Association.

tools.name: property_title_preliminary
tools.description: Retrieve preliminary title report excerpt: vesting, liens/mortgages, Schedule B exceptions, chain of title, survey notes, tax proration hints.

tools.name: property_inspection_report
tools.description: Retrieve home inspection summary narrative: roof, foundation/basement moisture, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, windows, life safety, and repair budget ranges.

tools.name: property_tax_history
tools.description: Retrieve assessed value trend, actual tax bills, exemptions, delinquency snapshot, and escrow modeling notes for the parcel.

tools.name: property_flood_hazard
tools.description: Retrieve flood zone (FEMA-style desk review), drainage, landslide/wildfire desk notes, and insurance underwriting checklist.

tools.name: property_comparable_sales
tools.description: Retrieve a written CMA-style comp table and qualitative adjustments vs subject, active competition, and rent comp notes.

tools.name: property_schools
tools.description: Retrieve default school assignments, performance snapshots, bus eligibility, IEP caveats, and rezoning risk notes.

tools.name: property_utilities_energy
tools.description: Retrieve electric/water/sewer/oil usage ranges, internet plan, trash, energy features, and a monthly operating budget model.

tools.name: property_permits_renovations
tools.description: Retrieve permit-indexed renovation history: roof, HVAC, kitchen, basement drainage, deck work, electrical upgrades, and open-permit snapshot.
